title: hieracium murorum subsp. hypsilophum
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. hypsilophum is a subspecies of the Hieracium murorum plant, belonging to the dandelion family and is commonly known as a weed with medicinal properties. It is used to treat various health issues due to its high content of flavonoids, sesquiterpenes, and phenolic acids, which exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The medicinal properties of Hieracium murorum subsp. hypsilophum make it beneficial for digestive issues, such as diarrhea and ulcers, as well as for respiratory problems, like bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Hieracium murorum subsp. hypsilophum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for oral consumption or topical application.
